ham.subject: Your Amazon/Flipkart Order Confirmation - Order #123456789
ham.body:
Hello [Name],

Thank you for shopping with Amazon/Flipkart. Your order #123456789 has been placed successfully.

Order Summary:
• Item: Wireless Earbuds
• Quantity: 1
• Price: INR 2,499

Shipping Details:
• Address: 12/34, Gopal Nagar, Mumbai - 400001
• Expected Delivery: 5-7 working days

For a detailed view of your order and to track the shipment, please click <URL>.

If you have any queries, feel free to contact our customer support.

Dhanyavaad for choosing Amazon/Flipkart.

Regards,
Customer Support

spam.subject: Urgent: Income Tax Refund Pending – Verify Your Details Now
spam.body:
Dear [Name],

We are pleased to inform you that your Income Tax refund of INR 45,000 is pending. To claim the refund, you must verify your bank details and PAN. Immediate action is required.

Please click on the link below to complete the verification:
<URL>

Failure to comply within 7 days may result in delay of your refund. If you do not take action, the refund will be held permanently.

Thank you for your prompt attention.

Regards,
Income Tax Department
